mapper.insert:
SELECT NVL(MAX((ATHR_ORDR)) + 1, 1) FROM TM_ECS_INTN_USR_SYS_ATHR
/* TM_ECS_INTN_USR_SYS_ATHR_insertUsrSysAthr */ INSERT INTO TM_ECS_INTN_USR_SYS_ATHR ( USR_ID, SYS_DIV_CD, ADMIN_DIV_CD, DTY_NM, CONECT_IP, ATHR_ORDR, USE_YN, FRST_REGIST_DT, FRST_RGSTR_ID, LAST_UPDT_DT, LAST_UPDUSR_ID ) VALUES ( #{usrId}, #{intnSysDivCd}, #{adminDivCd}, #{dtyNm}, #{conectIp}, #{athrOrdr}, NVL(#{useYn}, 'N'), SYSDATE, #{frstRgstrId}, SYSDATE, #{lastUpdusrId} )
